headline: A Look At Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Market context for Otis Worldwide Otis Worldwide (OTIS) has drawn attention after a period of softer share performance, with the stock closing at US$78.87 and recording negative returns over the past week, month, past 3 months, and year. See our latest analysis for Otis Worldwide. The recent share price weakness, including a 2.30% one day decline and an 11.86% 90 day share price return, contrasts with a 5 year total shareholder return of 7.80%.
